display_information.name: Job Apply
display_information.description: Generate tailored resumes, ATS resumes, cover letters, and interview prep cards — all from Slack.
display_information.long_description:
Job Apply bot lets you kick off a full application workflow or generate an interview prep card without leaving Slack.

Commands:
  /apply     — paste a job posting, enter company + role, get resume + ATS resume + cover letter
  /prep      — paste a job posting, pick a round type, get a tailored interview prep card
  /jobstatus — check that the backend API is healthy

All output files are uploaded to your Google Drive automatically.

slash_commands.description: Generate a tailored resume + cover letter for a job posting
Generate an interview prep card for an upcoming round
Check the status of the Job Apply API backend
